result.summary: Found 3 notable visual issues on this page: a critical content mismatch in the game count badge, and two major layout/clipping issues with truncated content on the right side of the screen.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays a badge reading '0 Games', yet multiple exclusive game tiles are clearly rendered below it. This is a data/rendering mismatch that could confuse users or indicate a failed API call for the count.
issues.suggestion: Fix the game count logic so the badge accurately reflects the number of games displayed. Ensure the count is fetched and rendered correctly before the component mounts.

issues.description: The third column of game tiles in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections is clipped/cut off at the right edge. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' are partially visible, indicating horizontal overflow without proper containment.
issues.suggestion: Apply overflow:hidden or adjust the grid/flex layout so that the third column either fits fully within the viewport or is hidden with a clear visual indicator (e.g., a fade or scroll arrow) to signal more content is available.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation tab bar at the top clips the last visible tab label to 'Hot Ga...' without any scroll indicator or affordance, making it unclear to the user that more tabs exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible right-side fade gradient or a chevron/arrow icon to communicate that the tab bar is horizontally scrollable. Ensure tab labels are not abruptly cut mid-word.
